headline: VP Strategic Partnerships & Supply
summary:
Taboola helps people find relevant content online, matching them with news stories, articles, blogs, videos, apps, products and other content they’re likely to want to explore.
How do we know what they’ll like? Using machine-learning algorithms, our technology analyzes hundreds of signals to capture exactly what kind of content is most likely to engage each individual. We do that more than 450 billion times a month for more than one billion unique users. 

Since we opened our doors in 2006, we have grown to become the leading discovery platform on the open web, serving a combination of the world’s best brands and the most respected global publishers.

Taboola is headquartered in New York City with local offices in Los Angeles, London, Tel Aviv, New Delhi, Bangkok, São Paulo, Beijing, Shanghai, Istanbul, Seoul, Sydney and Tokyo.

recommendations:
Séverine Gauthier

Fabien was my direct manager and also the Head of Programmatic of our business unit at Mozoo.

He hired me when I had no programmatic knowledge and offered to teach me everything he knows about it.
Trust me, he knows a lot about programmatic!

He was clearly interested in helping me grow as an employee and also as a person.
I’ve learnt so much thanks to Fabien, from programmatic to being a good Account Manager, as well as sales tips, industry best practice and I learnt even a lot from a personal point of view!

He also offered to arrange a meeting with some of the key members from different teams at Mozoo (Ad Ops, Yield Optimisation, Sales) so I could get more of an insight into their structure and goals.

His passion for the industry and market-related reading helped me too to improve my knowledge, through long Friday afternoon conversations where we discussed particular businesses or where I asked my continuing questions about the market or how to improve my skills.
Whenever I have questions or concerns, Fabien responds right away—and even follows up later in the week or month to make sure my issues have been resolved. His patience and willingness to help have motivated me to do the best job I can.

It was great to be part of Fabien’s team for almost 2 years. 

Thank you for all your help and for your incredible management!

David Agostinho

Tout le monde parle de RTB, beaucoup le pratiquent, mais rares sont ceux qui le maîtrisent : Fabien fait partie de cette catégorie.

Fabien concentre dans son discours, d'une transparence rare, la maîtrise de l'éco-systhème technique du RTB, et l'expérience pragmatique de celui-ci.

Avec lui, pas de promesses en l'air, mais un discours simple. On n'a jamais de mauvaises surprises avec Fabien, mais que des bonnes. Car on constate toujours que le discours tenu se concrétise.

Je vous le recommande chaudement, et suis pleinement satisfait d'avoir fait appel à Fabien et à ZEBESTOF.

Séverine Gauthier
